paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.24, with a 1.96 percent increase from the prior close and a 30.43 percent decrease over the last 21 sessions. There have been 2 new news articles in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include announcements from TradingView and FinanzNachrichten.de regarding Fermi Inc.'s second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, which is scheduled for August 13, 2026. These announcements were made on July 21 and July 20, respectively.

There have been various SEC filings recently, including a Schedule 13G filing on July 20, an 8-K filing on July 15 regarding the issuance of convertible senior notes, and an 8-K filing on July 13 regarding the resignation of director Miles Everson. Additionally, there was an 8-K filing on July 9 regarding the commencement of an offering for the sale of convertible senior notes and a Schedule 13D/A filing on July 8. There has been 1 Form 4 filing.
